meta.title: Bank of Baroda - Account, Deposit & Loan Document Requirements
meta.source: Bank of Baroda official website (bankofbaroda.bank.in) - personal banking, business banking, NRI banking, Banking Mantra articles, and official KYC/OVD circular
meta.disclaimer: Document and eligibility rules are revised periodically via RBI/BOB circulars. Display a 'last verified' date in the app and recommend users confirm with their home branch / bankofbaroda.bank.in before final submission.
meta.usage_note: Each product's full requirement = core_kyc (always) + the product's own 'common_documents' + the 'additional_documents' for the matched applicant_profile (salaried / self_employed / nri / senior_citizen / minor / pensioner / etc.)

core_kyc.description: Baseline KYC required for almost every product below.
identity_and_address_ovd_pick_one: Aadhaar Card (proof of possession of Aadhaar number)
Voter's ID Card (Election Commission of India)
NREGA Job Card (signed by State Govt officer)
Letter issued by National Population Register (NPR) with Name & Address
deemed_ovd_for_current_address_if_needed: Utility bill - electricity/telephone/postpaid mobile/piped gas (not older than 2 months)
Pension Payment Order (PPO) issued by Govt departments/PSUs (if it has address)
Allotment letter / registered leave-and-licence agreement from employer (Govt/PSU/listed company)
For foreign nationals: document from foreign Govt department or letter from Foreign Embassy/Mission in India
universal_extras: Duly filled and signed Account/Application Opening Form (AOF)
minor_extras: Birth Certificate (issued by Gram Panchayat / NAC / Municipal Corporation)
Recent photo of minor (if old enough)

common_documents: core_kyc (identity_and_address_ovd + mandatory_tax_id + universal_extras)
Initial deposit (cash/cheque/DD), unless zero-balance variant

sub_types.name: bob Super Savings Account
sub_types.description: Premium savings account - auto-sweep, locker discount, free DD

sub_types.name: Basic Savings Bank Deposit Account (BSBDA)
sub_types.description: Zero-balance financial inclusion account
sub_types.notes: RBI allows relaxed/small-account KYC for this variant

sub_types.name: bob Advantage Savings Account
sub_types.description: Low minimum-balance account with added benefits

sub_types.name: bob Lite Savings Account
sub_types.description: Entry-level account with RuPay Platinum debit card

sub_types.name: Salary / Salary Advantage Account
sub_types.description: Opened via employer salary tie-up

sub_types.name: Senior Citizen Savings Account
sub_types.description: 60+ benefits: higher FD rates, priority service
additional_documents: Age proof showing DOB (Passport/PAN/Driving Licence/Voter ID/Birth Certificate)

sub_types.name: Minor's Savings Account
sub_types.description: For individuals under 18, operated by guardian
additional_documents: Recent photo of minor (if old enough)

sub_types.name: Savings Account for Central/State Govt Employees
sub_types.description: Tailored for government staff
additional_documents: Government Employee ID card / appointment letter

sub_types.name: NRE Savings Account
sub_types.description: For NRIs - holds foreign income in INR, fully repatriable
additional_documents: Overseas address proof (utility bill/bank statement/driving licence of resident country)

sub_types.name: NRO Savings Account
sub_types.description: For NRIs - manages India-sourced income (rent, dividend, pension)
additional_documents: FEMA declaration of source of funds

common_documents: Current Account AOF
core_kyc of proprietor / all partners / all directors / authorised signatories
Photographs of all signatories
FATCA/CRS self-certification

sub_types.name: Baroda Small Business Current Account (BSBCA)
sub_types.description: For small traders/merchants - 'Pay as you use' model

sub_types.name: Baroda Advantage Current Account
sub_types.description: Small & medium businesses - low Quarterly Average Balance, free net banking

sub_types.name: bob Premium Current Account (BPCA)
sub_types.description: Medium-to-large businesses

sub_types.name: bob Premium Current Account - Privilege
sub_types.description: Large enterprises - unlimited transactions, absolute liquidity

sole_proprietorship: Proof of business name/existence - any 2 of: GST registration, Shop & Establishment certificate, Sales/Income-Tax returns in proprietor's name, CST/VAT certificate, IEC code, licence from statutory professional body, utility bill in business name
partnership_firm: One business-proof document (as in sole_proprietorship) in firm's name
private_or_public_limited_company: Board Resolution authorising account opening + naming signatories
huf: core_kyc of Karta and adult co-parceners
trust_society_association: List of trustees/managing-committee members with core_kyc

common_documents: Term/RD application form (or online request if existing KYC-compliant customer)
core_kyc (waived for existing KYC-compliant customers opening via net/mobile banking)
PAN / Form 60
2 photographs (new customers)
Nomination form

sub_types.name: Regular Fixed Deposit
sub_types.description: Tenure 7 days to 10 years; premature withdrawal & loan-against-FD allowed

sub_types.name: Baroda Tax Saving Fixed Deposit (RIRD / MIP / QIP variants)
sub_types.description: 5-year lock-in; Section 80C benefit up to Rs 1.5 lakh; no premature withdrawal or loan against this FD
additional_documents: PAN is mandatory (Form 60 NOT accepted for this product)

sub_types.name: Recurring Deposit (RD)
sub_types.description: Tenure 6 months to 10 years; monthly instalments from Rs 100
additional_documents: Standing instruction / auto-debit mandate for monthly instalment

sub_types.name: Senior Citizen FD
sub_types.description: Approx 0.50% additional interest over regular FD rates

sub_types.name: Capital Gain Account Scheme (CGAS)
sub_types.description: Tax exemption on capital gains; savings and term-deposit account options
additional_documents: Copy of sale deed of the asset transferred
Declaration as per Income Tax Rule 1962

sub_types.name: NRE / NRO / FCNR Fixed Deposits
sub_types.description: For NRIs; FCNR held in foreign currency (USD, GBP, EUR, AUD, CAD etc.)
additional_documents: FIRC/inward remittance proof or source-of-funds declaration

common_documents: Home Loan application form, duly filled & signed, with photographs
Identity proof: PAN (mandatory if loan > Rs 10 lakh) / Aadhaar / Voter ID / Driving Licence / Passport
Address proof: Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Voter ID / Passport / Ration Card / Registered Rent Agreement
Last 6 months' bank account statement
Processing-fee cheque
property_documents_everyone: Allotment letter / registered Sale Deed / Agreement to Sell (builder or seller)
Chain-of-title documents / Encumbrance Certificate (typically last 13-30 years)
Possession letter / Share certificate (co-op society, if applicable)

salaried: Form 16 / IT Returns for last 2 years
Investment proofs (FDs, shares), if used to support income
self_employed: IT Returns for last 3 years (individual & business)
Audited Balance Sheet & Profit-and-Loss statements (last 2-3 years), CA-certified
Business proof: GST / Shop Act / Trade licence / registration certificate
Partnership deed / Certificate of Incorporation (as applicable)
nri: Work permit / employment contract / appointment letter
Overseas salary slips (last 6 months) + employer ID
Power of Attorney (POA) to a representative in India
Continuous Discharge Certificate (CDC) for seafarers, if applicable
pensioner: Proof that pension will continue through the loan tenure
3 months' bank statement showing pension credit

personal_loan.eligibility_note: NRIs are NOT eligible for BOB Personal Loans (per official BOB FAQ)

salaried: Identity proof: Aadhaar / PAN / Voter ID / Passport / Driving Licence
Address proof: Driving Licence / Aadhaar / utility bills / bank statement
Income proof: Form 16, last 3 months' salary slips/salary certificate, last 6 months' bank statement (salary account)
self_employed: Identity & address proof same as salaried
Proof of business existence: GST registration / trade licence / business registration certificate
pensioner: Identity proof: Aadhaar / PAN / Voter ID / Passport / Driving Licence
Address proof: PAN / Driving Licence / utility bills / bank statement
Income proof: Pension document / PPO / bank account statements

vehicle_loan.eligibility_note: Applicant >= 21 yrs, co-applicant >= 18 yrs; (age + repayment tenure) <= 70 yrs
common_documents: Duly filled application form
Identity proof: PAN / Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Passport / Voter ID
Age proof: Passport / Ration Card / Aadhaar / PAN / Birth Certificate
Address proof (core_kyc list)
Photographs
Vehicle quotation / proforma invoice from dealer

student_applicant_documents: core_kyc: age proof, photo ID, address proof
Mark sheets - 10th, 12th, graduation (as applicable to course level)
Proof of admission: Offer/Admission letter (conditional letter accepted for study abroad)
Passport + visa copy (mandatory for studies abroad)
Fee structure/schedule of expenses from institution
education_loan.co_applicant_guarantor_note: Normally parent/guardian; for married applicants - spouse or parent-in-law

salaried: Last 3 months' salary slips or salary certificate
self_employed: IT Returns (last 2-3 years) with income computation

collateral_documents_above_7_5_lakh: Title deed and ownership documents of the property offered
other_documents: Vidya Lakshmi Portal application reference (BOB education loans routed via this Govt portal)
Signed Education Loan application form + bank's checklist

common_documents: Duly filled Gold Loan application form
Identity proof: PAN / Passport / Voter ID / Driving Licence / Aadhaar
Address proof: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Passport / recent utility bill / ration card
2 recent passport-size photographs
Self-declaration of ownership of the gold ornaments/coins offered as security
agri_gold_loan_additional: Land record/ownership documents (or tenancy proof) showing agricultural land holding
gold_loan.note: Income proof is generally NOT required for standard retail gold loans

common_documents: Application form with photo & signature
Identity proof: Aadhaar / PAN / Passport / Voter ID
Address proof - residence AND office: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Driving Licence / utility bill
Last 6 months' bank statements

Property documents: original title deeds with complete chain of ownership, latest property-tax/maintenance receipts, NOC/permission for mortgage from society or development authority, approved building plan

nri: Overseas salary certificate/income statement (attested by BOB's foreign office or competent local authority)

schemes_covered: PM Mudra Yojana - Tarun Plus (Rs 10-20 lakh)
General MSME Term Loan / Working Capital
common_documents: Duly filled application form with photographs
Identity proof: Aadhaar / PAN / Driving Licence / Passport / Voter ID - of all applicants/partners/directors
Residence proof: latest utility bills / Aadhaar / Voter ID / Passport / bank statement - of all applicants
Business proof: Udyam/Udyog Aadhaar registration, GST registration, trade licence, shop & establishment certificate (as applicable)
Last 2-3 years' ITR with income computation, audited Balance Sheet & P&L
Last 6 months' business bank statements
Proof of business continuity (ITR/trade licence/sales-tax certificate)
Entity-specific docs: Partnership deed, OR Certificate of Incorporation + MOA/AOA + Board resolution + list of directors (companies)
Collateral/property documents (lease/title deed), where security is offered
Projected financials (next 1-2 years) for working-capital/term-loan assessment
digital_mudra_loan_upto_50000_specific: Last 6 months' bank statement (downloaded digitally via net/mobile banking/email)
Details of associate concerns and existing loans

agriculture_loan_kcc.category_label: Agriculture Loan / Kisan Credit Card (Baroda KCC - BKCC)
common_documents: Duly filled KCC application form
Identity proof: Aadhaar / Voter ID / Driving Licence / Passport
Address proof (core_kyc list)
Land-holding document: Revenue-authority-certified land record or Online Land Record extract (ownership proof, OR lease/tenancy agreement for tenant farmers/share-croppers)
Passport-size photographs
Existing loan/no-dues details, if any
animal_husbandry_fisheries_kcc_additiona: Proof/details of the activity (dairy unit, poultry shed, fishery, etc.)
Collateral documents (land mortgage/charge) - mandatory if loan amount exceeds Rs 1.6 lakh

documents: Aadhaar Card AND PAN/Form 60 - both mandatory (per Govt Savings Promotion Rules, 2023)
ppf_account.eligibility_note: NRIs and HUFs cannot open a PPF account; joint accounts not allowed

account_types.name: NRE (Non-Resident External)
account_types.purpose: Park foreign income in INR; fully repatriable

account_types.name: NRO (Non-Resident Ordinary)
account_types.purpose: Manage India-sourced income (rent, dividends, pension); repatriation capped at approx USD 1 million/year

account_types.name: FCNR (Foreign Currency Non-Resident)
account_types.purpose: Hold deposits in foreign currency (USD, GBP, EUR, AUD, CAD, etc.)

nri_banking_overview.note: All three available as savings/current/term-deposit variants; use NRE/NRO Savings Account documents plus product-specific FEMA declarations
